task.title: Skip directives for markdown formatting
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #22637

Blacken docs uses HTML comments: https://github.com/adamchainz/blacken-docs/#markdown

Do we want something different? Should we support blacken docs' directives?

rating.rationale: Agent produced no output whatsoever. No research, no analysis, no recommendation, no code, no communication artifact. A low-complexity design question that required reading blacken-docs' directive format and proposing whether ruff should adopt or diverge from it — the agent did nothing.
